allow: Bash(node -e "const D=require\('better-sqlite3'\);const db=new D\('./data/app.db',{readonly:true}\);console.log\('agents:', db.prepare\('SELECT slug FROM agents ORDER BY slug'\).all\(\).map\(r=>r.slug\).join\(', '\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const m=require\('./agents/architecte/manifest.json'\); console.log\('model:', m.model ?? '\(none → uses LLM_PROVIDER default = lmstudio\)'\); console.log\('price:', m.monthly_price_eur\);")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 1234 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{ LocalAddress=$_.LocalAddress; Port=$_.LocalPort; PID=$_.OwningProcess; Process=$p.ProcessName; Path=$p.Path } } | Format-List)

Bash(curl -s -m 30 http://localhost:1234/v1/chat/completions -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"model":"local-model","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"dis bonjour en 3 mots"}],"max_tokens":20}')

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 1234 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{ PID=$_.OwningProcess; Process=$p.ProcessName } } | Format-Table -AutoSize; "--- all LM Studio processes ---"; Get-Process -Name "LM Studio" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, @{N='RAM\(MB\)';E={[int]\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 700; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { "still listening" } else { "port 3000 free" })

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_VideoController | ForEach-Object { [PSCustomObject]@{ Name=$_.Name; VRAM_GB=[math]::Round\($_.AdapterRAM/1GB,1\); Driver=$_.DriverVersion } } | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "$PWD\\.next" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(Test-Path "$PWD\\.next"\) { ".next still present" } else { ".next purgé" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 700; "dev stopped")
PowerShell(Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "$PWD\\.next" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(Test-Path "$PWD\\.next"\) { ".next présent" } else { ".next purgé" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 700; "stopped")
